//: Recommended Firebase Realtime Database rules for this site.
//1: Projects are NOT stored in Firebase (they live in projects-data.js), so the
//2: only writable data is the public like counter. These rules lock everything
//3: down except 'likes', which is publicly readable and can only ever be a
//4: non-negative number — so nobody can dump arbitrary data into your database.
//5: Apply: Firebase console -> Realtime Database -> Rules -> paste (without the // lines) -> Publish.
